name: wallet_abi_harness
description: Local Wallet ABI browser harness for builders and WalletConnect transport smoke testing

scripts.build: npm --prefix ../.. run build -w lwk_wallet_abi_sdk && vite build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix ../.. run build -w lwk_wallet_abi_sdk && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test:live: npm run typecheck && WALLET_ABI_HARNESS_LIVE=1 vitest run tests/live.test.ts
